decisions.rationale: Near-paraphrase of row 53036; both ask how to request/resend another OTP when it does not arrive.
Self-contained and directly asks what to do when the OTP does not reach the Postal Vote BD app.
Self-contained; asks about a missing confirmation SMS and locating resend in Postal Vote BD, aligned with an OTP-not-received flow.
Clearly about a verification OTP not arriving in the Postal Vote BD app and how to resend it.
Central, self-contained question about resending an OTP when it does not arrive in the Postal Voting BD app.
Near-paraphrase of resend rows 53036 and 53083; missing OTP message and re-requesting adds no distinct case.
Asks whether an OTP can be resent when not received; a clean OTP-not-received yes/no variant.
Clearly asks what to do if the SMS OTP is not received in Postal Vote BD.
Self-contained central next-steps question for OTP not received in the Postal Voting BD app.
Near-paraphrase of row 53062; 'OTP delivery not happen' is the same missing-delivery case.
Asks about the waiting time before requesting another OTP, not about an OTP failing to arrive; better fits OTP resend/cooldown.
Near-paraphrase of row 53036; both ask how to get/send another OTP when it does not arrive.
Near-paraphrase of row 53036; it asks to request a new OTP after not receiving one.
Near-paraphrase of row 53023; both ask what to do when an SMS OTP is not received.
Near-paraphrase of row 53077; both ask what to do when the OTP is not being received.
Near-paraphrase of row 53023; both cover SMS OTP not arriving and the next action.
Uses code-delivery wording, but in this app context clearly asks about the OTP/verification code not being delivered.
Self-contained; asks how to request the missing verification code in the Postal Vote BD app, aligned with OTP-not-received.
Directly asks what to do when the confirmation OTP is not received in Postal Vote BD.
Near-paraphrase of row 53036; both ask whether/how to request another OTP after not receiving one.
Near-paraphrase of row 53044; confirmation code not arriving is the same confirmation OTP-not-received case.
Near-paraphrase of rows 53023 and 53077; it only rewords OTP message not received and what to do.
Near-paraphrase of row 53077; both ask what to do about an OTP-not-received problem.
Near-paraphrase of row 53036; both ask how to send/resend the OTP again when it does not arrive.

result.packet_rationale: Rows were judged against the OTP-not-received intent for the Postal Vote BD app. Clean rows are self-contained and directly concern missing OTP/SMS/code delivery or resending after non-receipt. I flagged one cooldown-style question as a sibling collision because it asks only about resend timing. I also flagged close paraphrases where another target row already covers the same wording and subintent.
